allow: Bash(curl -sI -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" https://www.bcs.tw/)

Bash(python -c "import sys,re; t=sys.stdin.read\(\); locs=re.findall\(r'<loc>\\s*\([^<\\s]+\)', t\); [print\(l\) for l in locs]")

Bash(python -c "import re; html=open\('/tmp/bcs_prod.html',encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\); m=re.search\(r'id=\\"root\\">\(.+?\)</body>', html, re.S\); body=m.group\(1\) if m else ''; text=re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>','|',body\); text=re.sub\(r'\\|+','|',text\); print\(text[:800]\)")
